mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO platform_settings ( store_id, platform_type, commission_rate, delivery_fee, coupon_cost, platform_support_amount ) VALUES
( #{setting.storeId}, #{setting.platformType}, #{setting.commissionRate}, #{setting.deliveryFee}, #{setting.couponCost}, #{setting.platformSupportAmount} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, store_id, platform_type, commission_rate, delivery_fee, coupon_cost, platform_support_amount, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM platform_settings
WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY CASE platform_type WHEN 'BAEMIN' THEN 1 WHEN 'COUPANG_EATS' THEN 2 WHEN 'YOGIYO' THEN 3 WHEN 'DDANGYO' THEN 4 ELSE 99 END

SELECT id, store_id, platform_type, commission_rate, delivery_fee, coupon_cost, platform_support_amount, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM platform_settings
WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND platform_type = #{platformType} AND deleted_at IS NULL
